summary: The diff implements layout fixes for independent scrolling and proper spacing in the reading test interface. All three requirements appear to be addressed through flexbox layouts, overflow constraints, and z-index layering to prevent UI element overlap.

hallucinated_features.description: Exit fullscreen button with minimize icon in top-right corner
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention adding fullscreen controls or exit buttons. The requirement scope is limited to fixing layout overlaps, not adding new navigation features.
